customManagers.description: Container image refs pinned in role vars; quadlet templates render them.

The disaster-recovery runbook hardcodes the wordpress-db mariadb image so its fallback SQL load runs on the engine the role pins; same depName as roles/wordpress/vars wordpress_db_image, so renovate bumps the runbook copy in the same PR.
Grafana dashboard revisions pinned in role vars; the role fetches them from grafana.com at converge.

tflint pinned for CI (the lint workflow's setup-tflint) and the workstation (roles/dev/vars); no zypper package. Same depName, so both bump together; the pattern matches tflint_version and dev_tflint_version.

OpenTofu pinned for CI in both workflows' setup-opentofu step (lint.yml and terraform.yml); no zypper package renovate can track, so it follows upstream releases. Same depName, so both bump together; the terraform workflow's destructive-plan gate guards the live apply a terraform.yml bump fires, so minor/patch automerge like any other bump.
Hugo pinned in the Firebase deploy workflows and the go.sum autofix workflow (peaceiris/actions-hugo hugo-version); no zypper/pip package.
firebase-tools pinned in the Firebase deploy workflows (npx firebase-tools@<version>); the CLI does the keyless deploy.

packageRules.description: Grafana dashboard revisions are bare incrementing integers.
pinDigest updates carry no version change, so the lint check is enough to merge them unattended.
linuxserver images carry legacy build-number (151), two-part (5.14), and four-part tags that docker versioning reads as upgrades; their releases are strict semver, so reject the rest.
lidarr has a legacy 8.1.2135 tag that even strict semver accepts; mainline is 3.x.
Merging a plex bump deploys a container restart that kills active streams; only automerge in the small hours.

python-dateutil is a hard dep of hetzner.hcloud (its vendored hcloud SDK imports dateutil.parser.isoparse); upstream tried datetime.fromisoformat and reverted over the ISO-8601 Z suffix. It's stable, not abandoned, just release-inactive.

Blowfish (the Hugo theme) is an indirect gomod require in jonnyoc-site; config:best-practices skips indirect gomod deps, so enable them for that go.mod or the theme never updates. Minor/patch automerge like hugo: site-gate catches a build/compat break, and hugo-gosum-autofix.yml completes go.sum and re-triggers the gate on its amended commit.
